response.justification: The candidate lacks critical required qualifications for the role, including native-level Japanese proficiency, C programming experience for UNIX/Linux kernel development, and direct experience with embedded networking security features. While the resume demonstrates strong software engineering skills in web and mobile domains, there is no evidence of work with LAN-switch products, security technologies like MACsec or IEEE 802.1X, or embedded systems development.
strengths: Strong software development background with experience in multiple languages and frameworks
Proven ability to work in agile environments and contribute to complex projects
Demonstrated problem-solving skills and technical leadership in open-source projects
concerns: No experience with C programming for UNIX/Linux kernel development (required)
No demonstrated experience with embedded networking security features or LAN-switch products

key_factors.factor: C programming for UNIX/Linux kernel development
